device_name: Advanced Algorithms for Treatment Management Applications (AATMA)
intended_use: AATMA™ is a medical image processing library intended to produce derived data sets for use as input into radiation therapy treatment planning systems or other intermediate pre-treatment-planning appli
intended_use_full: AATMA™ is a medical image processing library intended to produce derived data sets for use as input into radiation therapy treatment planning systems or other intermediate pre-treatment-planning applications. AATMA™ does not provide a user interface and is designed to be accessed through its application programming interface (API) by other devices. The data sets created by AATMA™ must be reviewed and validated by a qualified healthcare professional prior to clinical use.
ground_truth: Expert contours on patient CT image sets
other_metrics: Head & Neck model: average DICE coefficient 0.84 (verification); Male Pelvis model: average DICE coefficient 0.93 (verification)
